title: NakedAndAfraid
description: A spigot plugin based of the YouTube Minecraft series Naked And Afraid
body:
# Naked And Afraid
![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbce3a269376626f67495893504c5c913061c90d.png)

This plugin is based off a popular youtube series. And is made from scratch. In this mod you cant chat with other people and you cant wear armour without it damaging you. This makes a fun challenge where you have to survive without knowing what has happened to the other players.
## Features
- No chat
- No death messages
- No join message
- Wearing armour hurts you

## Notes
To disable advancments run the command: /gamerule announceAdvancements false

proximity chat is not included with this plugin
